titleZh: 中国企业全球运营的最佳法律实践系列文章：董事会机制与少数股东权益保护——全球运营中的法律挑战与应对
titleEn: Best Legal Practices for the Global Operations of Chinese Enterprises: Board Mechanisms and Minority Shareholder Protection
abstractZh: 从跨境经营场景出发，比较董事会机制与少数股东保护安排，兼顾中国公司法规则与境外治理框架的衔接和风险控制。
abstractEn: Uses cross-border operating scenarios to compare board structures and minority-shareholder protection tools, linking PRC company-law issues with overseas governance expectations.
